files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,4 @@
+def price(base, is_member):
+    if not is_member:
+        return base * 0.8
+    return base
+

planted_defects.description: Inverted business rule: the discount is applied when the user is NOT a member ('if not is_member'), the opposite of the intended loyalty-member discount.
